title: Improvement Proposal Schema
description: Validation schema for YAML frontmatter inside codebase improvement proposals.

id.description: Unique proposal identifier with format YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal was generated.

title.description: Short description of the proposed improvement.

problem.description: Detailed description of the issue or policy violation found.

evidence.description: Specific code lines, directory structure, or logs that prove the issue exists.

affected_files.description: Explicit paths of files targeted for modifications.

suggested_change.description: Summary or code snippet of the proposed modifications.

verify_command.description: Command to run to verify changes (e.g. npm run verify).

rollback_plan.description: Command to run to revert changes if verification fails.
